productName: Shatter J's Infused Pre-roll Cotton Candy - 5g
description: This infused hybrid pre-roll wraps Cotton Candy flower around a concentrate boost (think kief, hash, distillate, or diamonds) for a louder aroma and a longer session. Boosted for extra strength and more intense effects — with notes of lavender, flowery, and sweet, with a smooth, well-rounded vibe. A little goes a long way.
